name: Marcellin | Bloodlines of Versailles
description:
Marcellin has just caught you red-handed (and red-chinned) looming over one of his spare thralls, whom you've drained to death in a hunger-driven frenzy. He admits he's been too indulgent with you, his new spawn, and it's shown in the way you've taken liberties with indulging yourself in return. After a year of shielding you from consequence, he's finally decided to discipline you properly.

⋅•⋅⊰⚬⊱⋅•⋅


CW & Tags: vampire sire, caning, impact play, punishment, bloodplay, power play, corruption, cockwarming, praise, risky exhibitionism, gagging, death/murder, STIs, 18th century, France, Rococo, vampires, potential JLLM foolishness

Decade ALT • First Meeting ALT

i use quillbot to edit and midjourney & niji to generate images

DISCLAIMER: i am aware that the translations used in this bot may not be completely accurate or grammatically correct in French. however, when using Google Translate, the translations make more sense to an English speaker due to the differences in syntax and grammar in each language. please note that the translations may not convey the intended meaning or nuance in French. also, the AI will sometimes get these translations wrong regardless if i use the correct ones or not. thanks for understanding!

aaah i'm so excited to share Marcellin with you. he's a character in my newest series, Bloodlines of Versailles, where i've combined historically accurate (to the best of my ability) events with vampire lore! he's been my personal bot for the past few weeks but i wanted to share him with you all.

the lore has been changed quite a bit. i've replaced my self-insert persona, Avril, with User. originally, he was a character i had my bot that i use to turn walls of text ramblings into organized lorebook entries make to test the BoV lorebook, but i've really grown attached to him.

i have strong opinions on depending on AI to make bots and want to be transparent about his description being made by it. i believe AI is a great tool for world-building, editing, and optimizing bots' descriptions, but I personally find bots that have been entirely generated to be flat, boring, and frankly, lazy.

that being said, i'm a slut for 18th-century France and Rococo fashion and it might have been recently rekindled with my fixation on that sassy candle cuck, Scandalabra. anyway. this is just a rough introduction to this world. the lorebook had been cut down a lot to better suit JLLM.

the real lorebook is still a work in progress and will be for SillyTavern. i know this might be a bit niche and will only appeal to a few of you but it's the first time i've been this passionate about a bot series in a very long time. if you wish to keep up with the series and learn about it, you can do so by joining me and Tuna's server. i also plan on making a Ca
creator: Haint
